name: Segmentum Solar
tone: The heart of the Imperium. Terra, Mars, Luna.

name: Segmentum Obscurus
tone: The galactic north. Cadia, Armageddon, Eye of Terror.

name: Segmentum Ultima
tone: The eastern fringe. Ultramar, Macragge, Tau Empire.

name: Segmentum Tempestus
tone: The southern reaches. Baal, Nocturne, Vigilus.

name: Segmentum Pacificus
tone: The western rim. Sabbat Worlds, Calixis.
